prompt.tutorial.title: New to Prompts?
prompt.tutorial.description: If you don't know what prompts are or how to use them, I recommend reading these articles in order:
prompt.tutorial.steps.title: Instruction Flow
prompt.tutorial.step1.title: AI Platform
prompt.tutorial.step1.description: Go to Gemini or Flow to start.
prompt.tutorial.step2.title: Reference Image
prompt.tutorial.step2.description: Upload at least one clear image of the character you want to represent.
prompt.tutorial.step3.title: Run Prompt
prompt.tutorial.step3.description: Copy the prompt below and paste it along with your image.
shop.title: Shop
shop.thankYou.title: Thank you for your purchase!
shop.thankYou.description: Your payment has been processed successfully.
shop.thankYou.alert: You can now download your file, but please note that this site does not store any user data, so download and store your file in a safe place.
paypal.completed.title: Thank you for your donation!
paypal.completed.description: Your generosity means the world to me. Thanks to your support, I can keep creating quality content.
paypal.cancel.title: Donation cancelled
paypal.cancel.description: No worries! If you changed your mind, you can always come back. Thanks for considering it.
ad.fallback.title: Hey! You have AdBlock enabled 🙈
ad.fallback.description: I need to eat 😅 If you don't want to see ads, you can support me donating.
404.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
footer.title: Let me demonstrate my experience
footer.description: My portfolio speaks for itself, but I'm eager to show you how I can apply my skills to your next project.
audit.title: Your clients search for you online. Do they find you?
audit.hero.description: A consultative audit that tells you the truth about your digital presence — and what to do about it.
audit.who.title: Who is it for?
audit.who.a.title: You have a website but it's not working
audit.who.a.description: Your site exists but nobody comes. I review it in depth: technical issues, content, conversion and the channels that should be bringing traffic.
audit.who.r.title: You have a website and want to redesign it
audit.who.r.description: Before redesigning, I audit. No redesign without a diagnosis first. I review your online reputation, active channels and brand assets before proposing anything.
audit.who.b.title: You don't have a website
audit.who.b.description: I evaluate whether it makes sense to build one now — and whether you're truly ready to sustain it. Sometimes there are more urgent steps before investing.
audit.layers.title: What I review
audit.layers.1.title: Traffic channels
audit.layers.1.description: Is anything bringing people in? Social media, Google Business Profile, campaigns, external mentions, email.
audit.layers.2.title: The website
audit.layers.2.description: Is it well built and does it communicate well? Speed, indexing, content, structure, conversion.
audit.layers.3.title: The visitor's action
audit.layers.3.description: Is it clear what to do upon arrival? CTA, forms, steps to contact.
audit.deliverables.title: What you get
audit.deliverables.1: A clear diagnosis of your current situation
audit.deliverables.2: A roadmap with phases, actions and responsibilities
audit.deliverables.3: Clarity on what I do and what depends on you
audit.deliverables.4: An honest recommendation — not a sales pitch
audit.quote: I build you the Ferrari. The wheel is yours.
audit.cta.title: Want to know where you really stand?
contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.form.name: Name
contact.form.subject: Subject
contact.form.success: Message sent successfully! I'll be in touch soon.
contact.form.error: There was an error sending the message. Please try again or reach me on my social media.
contact.props.heading: Why work with me?
